name: whatsapp-otp-gateway
description: Lightweight self-hosted WhatsApp OTP gateway with JSON sessions and multi-session failover.

scripts.check: node --check src/server.js && node --check src/cli.js && node --check src/gateway-config.js && node --check src/template-service.js && node --check src/session-manager.js && node --check src/otp-service.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/logger.js && node --check src/message-log.js && node --check src/middleware/api-key.js && node --check src/utils/files.js && node --check src/utils/phone.js
